name: xp-duplicate-attempt
description: Reprocess Automation 010 against an already-awarded Submission. Expect skip/repair; Source Key SUBMISSION_XP|{rid} remains unique.
prerequisites: Existing Submission with exactly one Submission Base XP

input_fields.note: Not a 115 create — re-run 010 on existing Submission RID

prohibited_side_effects: Second XP Event with same Source Key
safe_rerun_behavior: 010 must skip or repair same Event
manual_requirements: Re-run 010 from Airtable automation UI / test trigger

known_evidence.probe: 0 Submissions with >1 XP Event; 0 duplicate Source Keys (2026-07-23 baseline)
